summary: BLOCK 44.1-44.3 Profile Page refinements fully tested. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features working correctly. New Dreaming tab, Dream Value sub-headline, ISO excludes WISHLIST items, shared_dream_value in taste-match, mobile stats layout all verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend endpoints correctly implemented: GET /api/users/{username}/dreaming returns only WISHLIST items, GET /api/users/{username}/iso excludes WISHLIST items
GET /api/valuation/wishlist/{username} is a public endpoint (no auth required) returning dream value for any user
ProfilePage.js correctly has 6 tabs: Collection, Dreaming, ISO, Spinning, Trades, Mood (data-testid: tab-collection, tab-dreaming, tab-iso, tab-spinning, tab-trades, tab-mood)
Dream Value sub-headline displays 'If only I had $X... (Dream Value)' when user has wishlist value > 0 (data-testid: profile-dream-value)
Mobile stats layout: Following/Followers on same line with justify-around (verified y diff: 0px)
Common Ground overlay opens from Taste Match pill and shows 3 sections: Shared Collection, Shared Dreams, Perfect Swap
Show Common Records toggle works correctly - button toggles text from 'Show Common Records' to 'Showing Common Records'
Honey glow (boxShadow: '0 0 15px #FFD700') correctly applied to matching records
Non-matching records correctly get opacity: 0.3 when toggle is ON
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin and katieintheafterglow users
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 44.1-44.3 fully tested. Key endpoints: (1) GET /api/users/{username}/dreaming - returns only WISHLIST status items; (2) GET /api/users/{username}/iso - now excludes WISHLIST items; (3) GET /api/valuation/wishlist/{username} - public endpoint for dream value; (4) GET /api/users/{username}/taste-match - now includes shared_dream_value field. Frontend: ProfilePage has 6 tabs, Dreaming tab shows wishlist items with album art grid. 'In Your Collection' badge (data-testid: in-collection-dream-{id}) and 'Tell them about this pressing' CTA (data-testid: tell-them-{id}) only appear when viewer owns the dreaming record - couldn't visually verify because admin has 0% match with founder (no shared records/dreams). Stats layout verified on mobile: Following/Followers same row (justify-around), Records/Value second row.
